About Us

Puchong's Trusted
Construction Partner

Nadiah Trading Sdn. Bhd. is a registered construction company based in Puchong Prima, Selangor. Since our incorporation in 2011, we have grown into a capable and trusted contractor delivering civil structural and architectural construction services across Selangor and the Klang Valley. Our business address is at Pusat Perdagangan Puchong Prima, and our teams operate across residential, commercial, and industrial sites.

🏗️
Civil Structural Specialists

Carpentry, bar bending, concrete works and all related civil disciplines — handled by our skilled in-house workforce.

🏛️
Architectural Works

From initial finishes to full architectural delivery — we ensure every structure meets aesthetic and technical standards.

✅
CIDB Grade G7 Certified

Highest CIDB classification in Malaysia — authorised to undertake construction contracts of unlimited value across all categories including civil, structural and architectural works.

Contact Our Team
What We Offer

Our Construction Services

We cover the full spectrum of civil structural and architectural construction — providing specialist trades and complete build solutions.

🏗️ Civil Structure Works

01
🔨

Carpentry Works

Skilled formwork carpentry for concrete structures, timber framing, shuttering, and site hoarding. Our carpenters ensure precision at every stage of the structural build.

FormworkShutteringTimber Frame
02
🔩

Bar Bending (Rebar)

Expert reinforcement steel bending and placement for columns, beams, slabs, and foundations. We work to structural drawings with strict BBS compliance.

RebarBBSColumns & Beams
03
🏗

Concrete Works

Full concrete works from foundations and ground beams to suspended slabs and roof decks. We handle both ready-mix and in-situ concrete casting.

FoundationsSlabsReady-Mix

🏛️ Architectural Works

04
🧱

Brickwork & Masonry

Internal and external brickwork, block walling, and masonry finishes for residential and commercial structures built to specification.

BrickworkBlock WallPlastering
05
🎨

Finishing & Fitting

Floor and wall tiling, plastering, painting, ceiling works, door and window installation — complete interior and exterior architectural finishes.

TilingPaintingCeiling
06
🔧

Renovation & Remodelling

Full renovation works for residential and commercial spaces — structural modifications, refurbishments, and fit-out projects across Selangor.

ResidentialCommercialFit-Out

CIDB Malaysia

Grade G7 — All Categories

Why Choose Us

Built on Trust &
Expertise

With over 14 years of operations and a team of dedicated tradespeople, Nadiah Trading Sdn. Bhd. delivers construction projects that stand the test of time.

✓
SSM Registered Company

Fully incorporated under the Companies Act 2016 — registration 201101007237 (935375-T).

✓
Specialist Trades In-House

Our carpenters, bar benders, and concreters are employed directly — no sub-standard subcontracting for core works.

✓
Full Civil & Architectural Capability

From structural frame to finished walls and floors — we handle the entire build under one responsible contractor.

✓
CIDB Grade G7 — Unlimited Value Projects

Registered with CIDB Malaysia at G7 — the highest grade, qualified for construction contracts of any value. Categories: B04, CE21, M15.

✓
Proven Revenue: RM 14.8M (FY2024)

Over RM 14.8 million in construction revenue for FY2024 — a testament to our scale, trust, and delivery capability.
